page: Microsoft Azure M416ds_9_v3 is an x86_64 architecture server instance belonging to the MDSHighMemoryv3 family. It features 416 dedicated vCPUs powered by Intel processors and is managed via the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. The instance is equipped with an extensive memory capacity of 8568.0 GB, providing approximately 20.6 GB of RAM per core.

This server configuration includes 410 GB of local disk storage and is Premium Storage capable, allowing for high-performance external disk attachments. It does not include any integrated GPU accelerators, making it a purely CPU- and memory-driven resource.

Given the massive memory-to-vCPU ratio, this instance represents a high-density resource profile optimized for large-scale memory-bound workloads rather than general-purpose compute. It is designed for massive in-memory databases, large-scale enterprise applications, heavy data analytics, and memory-intensive transactional workloads that require substantial RAM capacity without GPU acceleration.
description: Microsoft Azure M416ds_9_v3 is a memory-optimized server instance from the MDSHighMemoryv3 family, designed for massive enterprise workloads. Built on the x86_64 architecture and running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, it features 416 dedicated Intel vCPUs and an extensive 8568.0 GB of system memory, yielding approximately 20.6 GB of RAM per core. The instance includes 410 GB of local disk storage and supports Premium Storage for high-throughput disk configurations. It does not contain any GPU hardware. This server is engineered for highly demanding memory-bound applications, making it suitable for large-scale in-memory databases, enterprise resource planning systems, and complex data analytics pipelines that require substantial memory capacity and high CPU core counts.
og_description: Microsoft Azure M416ds_9_v3 is a memory-optimized server featuring 416 dedicated Intel vCPUs, 8568 GB of RAM, and 410 GB of local storage, designed for massive in-memory database workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure M416ds_9_v3 is a memory-optimized server with 416 Intel vCPUs, 8568 GB RAM, and Premium Storage capability for enterprise workloads.
tagline: An ultra-high-capacity memory-optimized instance featuring four hundred sixteen dedicated cores and over eight terabytes of system RAM for enterprise databases.
